settings.title: Settings
settings.useOnyxAsNewTab: Use Onyx as new tab page

prospectScorer.name: Prospect ICP Scorer
prospectScorer.description: Score a prospect against your Ideal Customer Profile (ICP). Analyzes company size, decision-maker level, industry, and pain indicators.
prospectScorer.strategyA: Deploy Cold Loom (Charlie Morgan method) + personalized Front-End Offer immediately.
prospectScorer.strategyB: Start with Cold Email sequence (Aaron Shepherd method) with a value-first approach.
prospectScorer.strategyC: Add to nurture sequence. Engage via content and social proof before direct outreach.
prospectScorer.strategyD: Park for later. Focus efforts on higher-scoring prospects.

objectionHandler.name: Objection Handler (Manuel d'Élite)
objectionHandler.description: Generate elite objection responses using Daniel G's 3-attempt framework.
objectionHandler.needToThink: I need to think about it
objectionHandler.metaAdvice: Remember: The fortune is in the follow-up attempts. Never abandon at the first objection.

outreachScript.name: Outreach Script Generator
outreachScript.description: Generate Cold Loom, Cold Email, or Cold Call scripts using elite sales methodologies.

datasetIngestion.name: Dataset Ingestion
datasetIngestion.description: Import and score prospect lists (JSON/CSV) automatically.

telegramNotifier.name: Telegram Notifications
telegramNotifier.description: Send real-time prospection alerts to Telegram.

twilioOutreach.name: Twilio SMS & Voice
twilioOutreach.description: Automate outreach via SMS or voice call via Twilio.
